title: Refreshed Energistics
description: A resource pack giving a create-y makeover to applied energistics
body:
# Refreshed Energistics
Refreshed energistics is a resource pack that aims to give a fresh create-style coat of paint to the AE2 mod, without any brassification

## Feedback
please report any [issues](https://github.com/Szedann/Refreshed-Energistics/issues) and [ask questions](https://github.com/Szedann/Refreshed-Energistics/discussions) on [github](https://github.com/Szedann/Refreshed-Energistics)

## Credits
- this resource pack heavily bases on the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) mod assets and palettes
- thanks to fern for helping with the creation of some textures

---

*This Resource Pack is still not complete, some textures are yet to get changed*

*This resource pack was originally made for the Steam 'n' Rails Season 2 modpack*
